# Dialogue Examples

## Standard Mode

```text
User: /ah-review

AI: I have read today's daily note. I will first review completion, then process records and unfinished tasks.

AI: Now processing record 1...
1. Convert to permanent note
2. Convert to task
3. Mark processed
4. Defer to /ah-inbox

User: 1
AI: I will call ah-card to finish it, then continue.

User: 3
AI: Marked as processed.

AI: Next, let's place unfinished tasks: tomorrow / this week / later / done / drop.

AI: Before closing, confirm tomorrow's plan. Reply "no" or tell me tomorrow's tasks.
```

## Quick Handoff Mode

```text
User: I do not have much time tonight. Make it quick.

AI: Got it. I will prioritize 1-2 high-value records and defer the rest to /ah-inbox.

AI: Quick handoff complete:
- High-value items processed: 2
- Deferred to /ah-inbox: 5

AI: You can later run /ah-inbox to batch process the remaining records.
```
